meta.audit_strategy: After each phase ends, the orchestrating agent creates agent_plan/audits/phase_N_audit.json capturing findings, risks, and lessons learned before unlocking the next phase.

workflow_rules.phase_gate: A phase may NOT start until the previous phase's audit file is written and all subtasks have status = 'done'.
workflow_rules.agent_contract: Each sub-agent receives only its own phase object plus the global context block. It must update every subtask status and append findings[] before triggering the audit step.
workflow_rules.error_recovery: If a subtask is blocked, the agent records the blocker in findings[], proposes a fix, and escalates to the orchestrator before proceeding.

phases.description: Establish the database schema via Flyway and wire up all JPA entities and Spring Data repositories. Nothing above this layer compiles without it.

subtasks.title: Flyway Migration V3 — Admin Schema
instructions: ALTER TABLE pharmacies ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS active TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1
CREATE TABLE admin_users (id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PK, user_id BIGINT NOT NULL UNIQUE FK->users(id), created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

CREATE TABLE audit_logs (id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PK, admin_id BIGINT NOT NULL FK->users(id), action VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, target_type VARCHAR(60), target_id BIGINT, detail TEXT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
acceptance_criteria: Migration runs cleanly on a fresh MySQL 8 schema
IF NOT EXISTS guard prevents re-run failures
All foreign keys reference the correct shared tables
known_risks: Shared 'pharmacies' table may already have an 'active' column in another team's migration — use IF NOT EXISTS
Flyway checksum mismatch if file is edited after first run — never modify applied migrations

subtasks.title: JPA Entities — AdminUser & AuditLog
instructions: AdminUser: @Entity @Table(name='admin_users'), Long id, @OneToOne User user, LocalDateTime createdAt @CreationTimestamp
AuditLog: @Entity @Table(name='audit_logs'), Long id, Long adminId, String action, String targetType, Long targetId, String detail, LocalDateTime createdAt @CreationTimestamp
acceptance_criteria: Both entities compile with no warnings
AdminUser.user is lazy-loaded (@OneToOne(fetch=LAZY))
@CreationTimestamp populates createdAt automatically
known_risks: Bidirectional mapping cycles can cause infinite JSON serialization — annotate with @JsonIgnoreProperties if needed
Missing @Column(nullable=false) on required fields causes silent null inserts

subtasks.title: Spring Data Repositories
instructions: AdminUserRepository extends JpaRepository<AdminUser, Long>
AuditLogRepository extends JpaRepository<AuditLog, Long> + custom method: Page<AuditLog> findAllByOrderByCreatedAtDesc(Pageable pageable)
acceptance_criteria: Both interfaces compile and Spring Boot auto-creates implementations
Derived query method name matches the JPA naming convention exactly
known_risks: Typo in derived query method name (e.g., OrderBy vs orderBy casing) causes startup failure
Missing @Repository annotation is fine — JpaRepository implies it, but confirm Spring component scan covers the package

phase_exit_criteria: All P1 subtasks status = 'done'
mvn flyway:migrate runs without errors on test DB
mvn test -pl . compiles (entities and repos loadable by Spring context)
audit file agent_plan/audits/phase_1_audit.json written by DatabaseAgent

phases.description: Implement the data-transfer objects and the two non-service design patterns: Observer (event + listener) and Factory Method (notification factory). These are pure Java with no web tier dependency.

subtasks.title: DTOs — Java Records
instructions: UserSummaryDTO record: Long id, String email, String role, LocalDateTime createdAt
PharmacySummaryDTO record: Long id, String name, String address, boolean active, Double latitude, Double longitude
DashboardStatsDTO record: long totalUsers, long totalPharmacies, long activePharmacies, long totalPrescriptions, long prescriptionsToday, double treatmentRatePercent
PharmacyStatusUpdateDTO class (not record — needs Bean Validation): Boolean active with @NotNull(message='active field is required')
acceptance_criteria: Records compile under Java 17+
PharmacyStatusUpdateDTO fails validation when active is null
All DTO field names match the REST API spec in README section 5.2
known_risks: Java records cannot have mutable fields — ensure Jackson can deserialize them (requires jackson-databind >= 2.12 with parameter names module or @JsonCreator)
PharmacyStatusUpdateDTO must be a regular class to support @NotNull Bean Validation on fields

subtasks.title: Observer Pattern — AdminActionEvent & AuditLogListener
instructions: AdminActionEvent extends ApplicationEvent: fields Long adminId, String action, String targetType, Long targetId, String detail
AuditLogListener @Component: @EventListener(AdminActionEvent.class) @Async void handle(AdminActionEvent) — save AuditLog via AuditLogRepository
Add @EnableAsync to main @SpringBootApplication class
acceptance_criteria: @Async listener does not block the HTTP request thread
AuditLog is persisted to DB after each event
@EnableAsync is present exactly once in the application
known_risks: @Async requires a thread pool — default SimpleAsyncTaskExecutor is not production-grade; configure a ThreadPoolTaskExecutor bean if needed
If @EnableAsync is missing, @Async is silently ignored — test async behavior explicitly
Async exceptions are swallowed by default — consider an AsyncUncaughtExceptionHandler

subtasks.title: Factory Method Pattern — NotificationFactory
instructions: Notification interface: void send()
EmailNotification: stores recipient + message, send() logs via SLF4J 'Sending EMAIL to {}: {}'
SmsNotification: same structure, logs 'Sending SMS to {}: {}'
NotificationFactory: static createNotification(String type, String recipient, String message) — returns EmailNotification if type.equalsIgnoreCase('EMAIL'), else SmsNotification
acceptance_criteria: createNotification('EMAIL', ...) returns an EmailNotification instance
createNotification('SMS', ...) returns an SmsNotification instance
Unknown type falls back to SmsNotification (documented behavior)
No Spring beans — pure factory, instantiated directly
known_risks: Case sensitivity bugs if type check uses == instead of equalsIgnoreCase
No null-check on type parameter — add guard for null input to avoid NPE

phase_exit_criteria: All P2 subtasks status = 'done'
mvn compile succeeds with no errors
PharmacyStatusUpdateDTO validation test passes (null active -> ConstraintViolation)
audit file agent_plan/audits/phase_2_audit.json written by DomainAgent

phases.phase_name: Service Layer — Business Logic, Singleton & Decorator
phases.description: Implement all service beans including the Singleton dashboard aggregator and the Decorator wrapper for logging. Also implement the Global Exception Handler.

subtasks.title: AdminUserService
instructions: Page<UserSummaryDTO> getAllUsers(Pageable p): delegate to userRepository.findAll(p), map each User -> UserSummaryDTO manually
UserSummaryDTO getUserById(Long id): throw EntityNotFoundException if not found
acceptance_criteria: Manual mapping — no MapStruct dependency
EntityNotFoundException message: 'User with id {id} not found'
Pageable is passed through without modification
known_risks: User entity must have a 'role' field or getRoles() — verify shared entity schema before mapping
Page.map() is the idiomatic way to transform Page content — avoid collecting to list and re-wrapping

subtasks.title: AdminPharmacyServiceI interface + AdminPharmacyService impl
instructions: Interface: Page<PharmacySummaryDTO> getAllPharmacies(Pageable); PharmacySummaryDTO getPharmacyById(Long); PharmacySummaryDTO updateStatus(Long id, boolean active, Long adminId)

Impl: inject PharmacyRepository, ApplicationEventPublisher, use NotificationFactory. In updateStatus: fetch, set active, save, publish AdminActionEvent, call NotificationFactory.createNotification('EMAIL', pharmacy.getEmail(), '...').send()
acceptance_criteria: updateStatus publishes exactly one AdminActionEvent per call
EntityNotFoundException thrown when pharmacy ID not found
Notification is always sent after successful save
known_risks: PharmacyRepository is a shared repository — do not re-declare it; inject from the shared package
ApplicationEventPublisher must be injected, not retrieved from context manually
Email field may be null on some Pharmacy rows — null-safe the notification call

subtasks.title: Decorator — LoggingAdminPharmacyService (@Primary)
instructions: @Primary @Service implements AdminPharmacyServiceI
Constructor-inject AdminPharmacyService (the concrete impl, not the interface)
Each method: log entry (INFO) -> delegate -> log exit (INFO) -> return result
acceptance_criteria: @Primary ensures this is the default bean injected everywhere
Delegate is the raw AdminPharmacyService, not the decorated version (avoids infinite loop)
Logging does not alter return values or throw additional exceptions
known_risks: If delegate is injected as AdminPharmacyServiceI Spring may inject LoggingAdminPharmacyService back into itself (circular) — always inject the concrete class AdminPharmacyService
@Primary without @Qualifier on the delegate injection point causes ambiguity — use @Qualifier('adminPharmacyService') on the constructor param

subtasks.title: Singleton — AdminDashboardService
instructions: @Service (Singleton via Spring IoC)
Inject: UserRepository, PharmacyRepository, PrescriptionRepository, OrderRepository
getStats(): compute DashboardStatsDTO — totalUsers, totalPharmacies, activePharmacies (count where active=true), totalPrescriptions, prescriptionsToday (createdAt >= today), treatmentRatePercent
Add Javadoc: '/** Singleton — single instance managed by Spring IoC container. */'
acceptance_criteria: treatmentRatePercent = (prescriptionsToday / totalPrescriptions) * 100 — handle division by zero
Javadoc explicitly documents the Singleton pattern
All repository calls are read-only (no save/delete)
known_risks: PrescriptionRepository.countByCreatedAtGreaterThanEqual(today) requires a @Query or derived method — verify shared repo exposes this or add a custom query
Division by zero when totalPrescriptions = 0 — default treatmentRatePercent to 0.0
Shared repositories may not be in the admin package — confirm package scan includes them

subtasks.title: Global Exception Handler
instructions: @RestControllerAdvice
EntityNotFoundException -> 404 JSON: {timestamp, status:404, error:'Not Found', message, path}
MethodArgumentNotValidException -> 400 with field error list
AccessDeniedException -> 403
Exception (fallback) -> 500
acceptance_criteria: All error responses use the unified error envelope schema from README section 5.3
HttpServletRequest injected to extract path for error body
400 response lists ALL field validation errors, not just the first
known_risks: If another @ControllerAdvice exists in the shared package, handler order may conflict — use @Order(Ordered.HIGHEST_PRECEDENCE)
AccessDeniedException is in spring-security — ensure the dependency is on the classpath before handling it
Generic Exception handler may swallow useful context — log at ERROR level before returning 500

phase_exit_criteria: All P3 subtasks status = 'done'
mvn compile succeeds
LoggingAdminPharmacyService is @Primary and no circular bean dependency
AdminDashboardService Javadoc present
audit file agent_plan/audits/phase_3_audit.json written by ServiceAgent

phases.description: Wire up Spring Security JWT configuration and implement all three REST controllers with full OpenAPI/Swagger annotations.

subtasks.title: Security Configuration — AdminSecurityConfig
instructions: @Configuration @EnableWebSecurity @EnableMethodSecurity
SecurityFilterChain: permit /api/v1/auth/**, /swagger-ui/**, /v3/api-docs/**; hasRole('ADMIN') for /api/v1/admin/**; anyRequest authenticated
Add JwtAuthenticationFilter before UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter
PasswordEncoder bean: BCryptPasswordEncoder(strength=12)
SessionCreationPolicy.STATELESS
acceptance_criteria: Unauthenticated requests to /api/v1/admin/** return 403
Non-ADMIN JWT tokens receive 403 on admin endpoints
Swagger UI is accessible without auth
Session is stateless (no JSESSIONID cookie)
known_risks: If JwtAuthenticationFilter is defined in a shared package, import it correctly — do not redefine it
Multiple SecurityFilterChain beans in the same application cause order conflicts — use @Order or merge configs
CSRF must be disabled for stateless REST API
CORS may need to be configured if frontend is on a different origin

subtasks.title: AdminUserController
instructions: GET /api/v1/admin/users (Pageable, @PageableDefault(size=10)) -> 200 Page<UserSummaryDTO>
GET /api/v1/admin/users/{id} -> 200 UserSummaryDTO or 404
@Operation and @ApiResponse for each endpoint
@PreAuthorize("hasRole('ADMIN')")
acceptance_criteria: Pageable defaults to size=10
404 from service propagates through GlobalExceptionHandler
Swagger UI shows both endpoints under 'Admin' tag
known_risks: @PageableDefault only works if Spring MVC PageableHandlerMethodArgumentResolver is registered (auto-configured by spring-boot-starter-data-jpa)
Returning Page<> directly serializes Spring's Page implementation — consider wrapping or using @JsonView for cleaner API

subtasks.title: AdminPharmacyController
instructions: GET /pharmacies (Pageable) -> 200
GET /pharmacies/{id} -> 200 or 404
PATCH /pharmacies/{id}/status (@RequestBody @Valid PharmacyStatusUpdateDTO, @AuthenticationPrincipal to extract adminId) -> 200 PharmacySummaryDTO
@Operation and @ApiResponse annotations
acceptance_criteria: PATCH with null active body field returns 400 with validation error message
adminId extracted from JWT principal, not from request body (security requirement)
200 response on PATCH includes updated active value
known_risks: @AuthenticationPrincipal may return null if security context is not populated — add null check or handle in @ControllerAdvice
PATCH vs PUT semantics: PATCH is partial update — body should only contain fields being changed
adminId extraction depends on how UserDetails is implemented in the shared security package — verify field name

subtasks.title: AdminDashboardController
instructions: GET /api/v1/admin/dashboard -> 200 DashboardStatsDTO
@Operation summary: 'Get admin KPI dashboard statistics'
@ApiResponse for 200 and 403
acceptance_criteria: Response matches DashboardStatsDTO schema exactly
Endpoint documented in Swagger UI
Returns 403 without valid ADMIN JWT
known_risks: DashboardStatsDTO is a record — ensure Jackson serializes all record components correctly (Spring Boot 3.x handles this by default)

phase_exit_criteria: All P4 subtasks status = 'done'
mvn spring-boot:run starts without errors
Swagger UI accessible at /swagger-ui/index.html
curl -X GET /api/v1/admin/users without token returns 403
audit file agent_plan/audits/phase_4_audit.json written by APIAgent

phases.description: Write all unit tests (TDD approach for T11), integration tests using H2, and the Postman/Newman collection. Validate JaCoCo coverage gates.

subtasks.title: Unit Test — AdminUserServiceTest
instructions: Mock UserRepository with Mockito
Test: getAllUsers returns Page<UserSummaryDTO> with correct mappings
Test: getUserById returns DTO for valid ID
Test: getUserById throws EntityNotFoundException for unknown ID
acceptance_criteria: All 3 test cases pass
Mockito verifies repository interactions
No Spring context loaded (pure unit test)
known_risks: Page mocking requires PageImpl — use new PageImpl<>(list, pageable, totalCount)
EntityNotFoundException type must match what the service actually throws — import from the correct package

subtasks.title: Unit Test — AdminPharmacyServiceTest (TDD first)
subtasks.tdd_note: Write tests BEFORE service implementation is finalized — this is a TDD task.
instructions: Test: updateStatus sets active field correctly on saved entity
Test: updateStatus publishes exactly one AdminActionEvent via ApplicationEventPublisher
Test: updateStatus throws EntityNotFoundException for unknown pharmacy ID
acceptance_criteria: Tests written before or alongside implementation (TDD)
ArgumentCaptor used to verify event content
All 3 test cases pass
known_risks: Mocking ApplicationEventPublisher — verify(publisher).publishEvent(any(AdminActionEvent.class))
TDD order: test must fail first, then implementation makes it green — document this cycle in the audit

subtasks.title: Unit Test — AdminDashboardServiceTest
instructions: Mock all 4 repositories
Stub counts with known values
Test: getStats() returns DashboardStatsDTO with correct computed treatmentRatePercent
Test: treatmentRatePercent = 0.0 when totalPrescriptions = 0 (division-by-zero guard)
acceptance_criteria: Both test cases pass
treatmentRatePercent calculated correctly
Zero-division edge case covered
known_risks: Double comparison in assertions — use assertThat(result).isCloseTo(expected, offset(0.01))

subtasks.title: Unit Test — AuditLogListenerTest
instructions: Create AdminActionEvent with known values
Call listener.handle(event) directly
Verify auditLogRepository.save() called once with matching AuditLog fields
acceptance_criteria: save() called exactly once
Saved AuditLog fields match event fields
known_risks: @Async is bypassed in direct method call tests — this is intentional for unit testing
Use ArgumentCaptor<AuditLog> to inspect the saved object

subtasks.title: Unit Test — AdminPharmacyControllerTest (@WebMvcTest)
instructions: Use @WebMvcTest(AdminPharmacyController.class)
Test: PATCH /pharmacies/1/status with {active:false} -> 200
Test: PATCH /pharmacies/1/status with {} (missing active) -> 400
Test: PATCH /pharmacies/1/status without ADMIN role -> 403
acceptance_criteria: All 3 test cases pass
MockMvc used for HTTP-level assertions
Security context mocked with @WithMockUser(roles='ADMIN') for authorized tests
known_risks: @WebMvcTest does not load full security config by default — configure @MockBean for JwtAuthenticationFilter
@WithMockUser may not populate @AuthenticationPrincipal correctly for custom UserDetails — use @WithUserDetails or mock the principal

subtasks.title: Integration Tests — AdminIntegrationTest
instructions: @SpringBootTest(webEnvironment=RANDOM_PORT) @AutoConfigureMockMvc @ActiveProfiles('test')
application-test.yml: H2 in-memory, ddl-auto=create-drop
Seed AdminUser and Pharmacy in @BeforeEach via repositories
Test: GET /api/v1/admin/users with admin JWT -> 200, non-empty content
Test: PATCH /pharmacies/{id}/status {active:false} -> 200, active=false
Test: GET /dashboard -> 200, treatmentRatePercent present
Test: any admin endpoint without JWT -> 403
Helper: generateAdminJwt() using test secret from application-test.yml
acceptance_criteria: All 4 integration tests pass
H2 schema created by Flyway migrations in test profile
JWT generated with same secret as app config to avoid signature mismatch
Tests are isolated (@BeforeEach cleanup + recreate)
known_risks: Flyway may conflict with ddl-auto=create-drop — set spring.flyway.enabled=false in test profile and use ddl-auto=create-drop only
Shared entity tables (users, pharmacies) must be seeded before running admin tests
JWT secret in test config must match the secret in AdminSecurityConfig / JwtAuthenticationFilter

subtasks.title: Postman Collection + Newman CI
instructions: Collection: 'Admin Workflow — INF4121'
Pre-request script: auto-login and store JWT token in pm.collectionVariables
Variables: baseUrl, adminEmail, adminPassword
7 requests as specified in T13 with pm.test assertions
Newman run command: newman run Admin_Workflow.postman_collection.json --reporters cli,json --reporter-json-export newman-report.json
acceptance_criteria: All 7 Postman tests pass against a running local server
Newman exits with code 0
newman-report.json generated for CI artifact storage
known_risks: Admin user must exist in the DB before collection runs — add a setup request or seed script
Token expiry between requests in a slow CI environment — set a generous JWT TTL for testing
Newman must be installed: npm install -g newman

subtasks.title: JaCoCo Coverage Validation
instructions: Run: mvn verify -Pjacoco
Enforce: instruction coverage >= 80%, branch coverage >= 70% on com.pharmacy.admin package
If coverage is below threshold, identify uncovered methods and add targeted tests
acceptance_criteria: mvn verify passes without JaCoCo threshold violations
Coverage report at target/site/jacoco/index.html reviewed
known_risks: Auto-generated Spring proxies inflate coverage numbers — exclude them with @Generated if needed
Branch coverage below 70% usually means missing negative/edge-case tests

phase_exit_criteria: All P5 subtasks status = 'done'
mvn verify passes (all tests green, JaCoCo thresholds met)
newman run exits with code 0
audit file agent_plan/audits/phase_5_audit.json written by TestAgent

audit_file_schema.description: Schema every agent must follow when writing phase_N_audit.json at end of phase

findings.lesson_learned: <key takeaway to avoid this in future phases>
